CEOs think AI use is mandatory - but employees don't agree, survey says

By Kathryn Moody

March 10, 2026

Several disconnects exist between C-suite executives and employees on artificial intelligence tool use.

Managers said adoption plans move faster when workers understand the point of the rollout.

Sign up for the free newsletter.

Why it matters

HR leaders may need clearer communication and training plans before mandating new tools.

  • Employees want role-specific guidance.
  • Change management matters as much as the software itself.

Read more: Related coverage that should be removed.

Share this article
